QC ES-1500 RF Specifications
Air Flow 1,434 CFM
HVI-916 Airflow (for CA Title 24 New Construction) 1,010 CFM
Recommended SQFT Coverage @ 2-3 CFM per SQFT Covers 478 SQFT to 717 SQFT

# of Speeds 1
dBA 37.2

Duct Diameter 14”
Duct Length 6 feet
Motor Head Diameter 14 1/2”
Motor Head Length 13 1/2”
Dampers Barometric Pressurized R5 Dampers
Controls Included IT-36003 QuietCool Wireless RF Control Kit with
Glass W
